title: Companion configuration
description: The configuration contract for one companion instance. Validates config/companion.example.json (template mode) and the runtime configuration loaded from the companion_profile database row (deployed mode). See docs/governance/companion-config-contract.md. This schema describes structure, enums, and keys only; it cannot express the platform governance floor, which is enforced in code and database schema and is never configurable.

schema_version.description: The configuration contract version (MAJOR.MINOR). Config-file metadata; see the contract doc for evolution and version-mismatch rules.

_comment.description: Optional human-readable note. Config-file metadata only; ignored at runtime and never persisted.

companion.description: Isomorphic with the companion_profile row: name -> companion_name, persona -> persona, voice -> voice, safety -> safety.

name.$comment: deployed mode: must be non-empty; blank in the master template
name.description: The companion's name. Maps to companion_profile.companion_name.

tone.$comment: deployed mode: must be non-empty; blank in the master template

speaking_style.$comment: deployed mode: must be non-empty; blank in the master template
speaking_style.description: How the companion phrases and paces what it says.

values.description: Optional short value statements. May be empty.

cultural_tone.description: The companion's posture toward cultural context. Describes posture, never a specific culture; specifics belong in cultural_notes.

cultural_notes.description: Optional free-text explanation for cultural_tone. May be empty.

faith_tone.description: The companion's posture toward faith. Describes posture, never a specific religion; specifics belong in faith_notes.

faith_notes.description: Optional free-text explanation for faith_tone. May be empty.

topics.description: Controlled-vocabulary topic preferences. 'disallowed' adds to the platform floor; it can never widen behavior past it.

disallowed.description: Topic tags this instance additionally restricts.

encouraged.description: Topic tags this instance leans into.

notes.description: Optional free-text explanation. May be empty.

terminology.description: Wording the companion uses. Defaults are generic and always present.

reminders.description: Reminder presentation. Reminder delivery itself is a platform subsystem.

voice_id.$comment: deployed mode: must be non-empty when enabled is true; enforced structurally by if/then below
voice_id.description: Provider voice identifier. Blank in the master template.

safety.description: Maps to companion_profile.safety (JSONB). Configuration here may only make the companion more cautious; it can never lower the platform safety floor.

posture.description: Safety posture. 'standard' is the platform floor and the lowest representable value; no weaker posture can be expressed.

emotionalBoundaries.description: Distress escalation is platform floor and is intentionally NOT configurable here. Every instance escalates distress per the platform safety floor.

comfort_role.description: The companion's comfort role. Clinical roles (therapist, clinician, counselor) are not representable values.

escalation.description: Escalation routing preferences. That escalation occurs and is audited is platform floor; only the routing preference is configurable.

contact_order.description: Ordered escalation preference by role. Holds role tokens only — never names or contact details.

topicTag.description: The v1.0 controlled topic vocabulary. Extending this list is a MINOR version bump.
